_notes: TurnRDV1 = original learned attention decomposer (best v1 variant). Canonical-vocabulary copy of configs/method_hgpo_turnrd_lean.json with: K=4 (matches Progressive), lambda_consistency=0 (no C3 consistency loss), lambda_value=0 + value_head=false (no V-head loss), lambda_entropy=0 (no negative-entropy reg), lambda_contrastive=0 (no contrastive aux), refresh_every_episodes=10 (4x per 40-ep round). Volume paths point to /vol/cache/TurnRDV1/* so canonical-name runs do NOT pollute the legacy method_b_lean caches. Populates methods_comparison.json::TurnRDV1.
